title: Rich Midnight Mango Sorbet
description: A rich and fluffy dessert that caters to midnight cravings with a Mexican (Oaxacan) twist featuring dried mangoes, blanched, in a way that is both delicious and suitable for those following a low FODMAP diet.

ingredients.name: 1/2 cup of fresh mango juice
ingredients.notes: Use only if fresh mango is not available.

ingredients.name: 1/4 cup of honey or agave nectar (if needed)

instructions: Combine dried mango pieces in a blender.
Add fresh mango juice and honey/agave to the blender, blend until smooth.
Pour mixture into a container with an airtight lid.
Refrigerate for at least 2 hours before serving.
Chill the sorbet mixture again for about half an hour before freezing.
Freeze in an ice cream maker according to manufacturer's instructions or transfer to a freezer-safe container and freeze completely for about 4-6 hours.
